case_title: BUREAUS INVESTMENT GROUP PORTFOLIO NO 15 LLC VS. RONNIE A. SILAN

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUREAUS INVESTMENT GROUP PORTFOLIO NO 15 LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SILAN, RONNIE A. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2012

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 2/29/12, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUREAUS INVESTMENT GROUP PORTFOLIO NO 15 LLC SERVED FEB-28-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SILAN, RONNIE A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-31-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUREAUS INVESTMENT GROUP PORTFOLIO NO 15 LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SILAN, RONNIE A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-31-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-31-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 30 , INCLUSIVE ONLY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $459.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SILAN, RONNIE A.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1033; WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUREAUS INVESTMENT GROUP PORTFOLIO NO 15 LLC
DECLARATION RE: COPY IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA EVIDENCE CODE 1550 & 1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUREAUS INVESTMENT GROUP PORTFOLIO NO 15 LLC
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY CCP 585 (D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUREAUS INVESTMENT GROUP PORTFOLIO NO 15 LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUREAUS INVESTMENT GROUP PORTFOLIO NO 15 LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILAN, RONNIE A. $19,638.41 PRINCIPAL, $459.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,097.41, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-30-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
